message:
feat(e2e): add scenario matrix execution with stress, fault-injection, and cross-arch classes

Introduce ScenarioMatrixEntry, ScenarioEvidencePack, and
ScenarioMatrixReport types with run_scenario_matrix() orchestration.
Each scenario produces a full evidence pack with artifact paths,
completeness audit, and replay pointer. Summary JSON and markdown
are written atomically.

Add ScenarioClass enum (Stress, FaultInjection, CrossArch),
ArtifactCollector::root() accessor, and path_relative_to() helper.
Tests cover 3-class matrix execution, artifact existence, cross-arch
metadata propagation, and empty-input rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
